title: Web Development
description: I build scalable, maintainable, and high-performance web applications using modern technologies and best practices. My approach focuses on clean architecture, reusable components, and optimized performance to ensure long-term stability and growth.

title: UI/UX Design
description: I design intuitive and visually engaging user interfaces that prioritize usability and accessibility. Every design decision is driven by user behavior, ensuring seamless experiences that balance aesthetics with functionality.

title: SEO Optimization
description: I improve website visibility through technical SEO, structured data, and performance optimization strategies. By focusing on Core Web Vitals and search best practices, I help drive organic traffic and long-term growth.

title: Quality Assurance
description: I ensure application reliability through systematic testing, debugging, and validation across different devices and browsers. My process minimizes bugs and guarantees a stable, consistent user experience.

title: Wireframing
description: I create structured wireframes and prototypes that map out user flows and interface behavior. This helps align stakeholders early in the process and reduces development risks through clear visual planning.

title: Project Management
description: I lead projects using agile methodologies, ensuring efficient collaboration and timely delivery. With a focus on clear communication and structured workflows, I keep teams aligned and projects on track from start to finish.
